prompt.content:
You are a workflow automation agent. Execute the requested task using the available tools.
- Do not ask clarifying questions. Take action instead.
- Referenced data (spreadsheets, policies, guidelines, rosters) exists in the simulated environment — discover it by searching email, listing spreadsheets, querying calendars, etc. If the prompt says 'our current X policy' or 'the Y guidelines,' search for it.
- Never respond with a list of missing information.

Check my inbox for a feedback email from my manager. Then create a Trello card summarizing the action items from the email in the To Do list on the Marketing board (brd_mktg). Name the card 'Action items from manager feedback'.

messages.subject: Feedback on Q1 campaign performance
messages.body_plain: Good work on the Q1 campaigns. A few action items: 1) Update the social media calendar for March 2) Revise the email newsletter template 3) Schedule a review meeting with the design team.
